Text: I value Carl. He is a hard working, intelligent, and listening person.     During my five years as Vice President for Personnel with Wycliffe USA, Carl served in several key roles within my department. He lead a team of trainers and coaches to completely redesign a major component of Wycliffe's orientation for all new missionary staff. He did an excellent job at this, producing a program that was well received by participants and proved to be very effective for the organization.    During this time Carl also lead a smaller team the provided career guidance counseling services to Wycliffe's staff. Here again Carl brought professionalism to the job. As in his other roles, he regularly participated in personal professional skill development, and encouraged his staff to do the same.    There were a few occasions where Carl and I had disagreements on the best way forward. In each occasion, we were able to work through the disagreement and come to a better position for us and for the organization. I value staff who are willing to voice a strongly held position, yet equally willing to work through a difference in order to accomplish our shared goals. I grew through my interactions with Carl, and the organization certainly benefited from those conflicts.    I do not hesitate to endorse Carl Campbell.
